query_title: Scooby-Doo! and the Legend of the Vampire

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Monster of Mexico
recommendations.overview: A friend of Fred's, Alejo Otero, invites the Scooby gang to Veracruz, Mexico. There they find a monster, El Chupacabra, terrorizing the town.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Loch Ness Monster
recommendations.genres: Family, Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Mystery
recommendations.overview: While the gang travel to Scotland to visit Daphne's cousin and witness the annual Highland Games, they find themselves terrorized by the legendary Loch Ness Monster.

recommendations.title: KPop Demon Hunters
recommendations.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Pirates Ahoy!
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Animation, Comedy, Family, Mystery, Adventure
recommendations.overview: It's horror on the high seas when Scooby-Doo and the gang take a creepy cruise into one of the world's most mysterious places, the Bermuda Triangle! If Scooby, Shaggy and the gang can't solve this mystery, they may have to walk the plank.

recommendations.title: Tom and Jerry: Shiver Me Whiskers
recommendations.overview: Dueling cat-and-mouse team Tom and Jerry hit the high seas on a hunt for buried treasure in this pirate adventure. The tale begins when crew member Tom sets sail with an infamous pirate and finds a treasure map along with stowaway Jerry. The furry sw

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo and the Alien Invaders
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Mystery, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A cosmic case of flying saucers, intergalactic intrigue and out-of-this-world romance launches Scooby-Doo! and the Mystery Inc., Gang into their most unearthly adventure ever.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! & Batman: The Brave and the Bold
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Action, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and the Mystery Inc. gang meet up with Batman and other friends to defeat evil villains and save the day.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! in Where's My Mummy?
recommendations.genres: Mystery, Animation, Family, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and the Mystery Inc. gang become involved in a supernatural mystery in Egypt.

recommendations.title: Vampire Sisters 2: Bats in the Belly
recommendations.overview: Teen half vampire Dakaria falls in love with rock singer vampire Murdo. Dakaria, her friends and family have to face vampire Xantor who has dark plans.

recommendations.title: My Little Pony: A New Generation
recommendations.overview: Equestria's divided. But a bright-eyed hero believes Earth Ponies, Pegasi and Unicorns should be pals — and, hoof to heart, she’s determined to prove it.
